title: General Recreational Activities/Sports * AIDS/HIV Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > General Recreational Activities/Sports * AIDS/HIV Issues 4 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Blindness Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Native American Community Native American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ECUMENICAL MINISTRIES OF OREGON ECUMENICAL MINISTRIES OF OREGON HIV DAY CENTER HIV SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center serving hot breakfast and lunches, access to phones and computers, and recreational activities such as art therapy, games, and video-based media. Also provides clothing, showers, mail services, and hygiene supplies. Guests have access to laundry services, massages, acupuncture, foot care, and haircuts on a sign-up basis. 2941 NE Ainsworth Street Basement Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Individuals who are HIV-positive and have incomes no greater than 300% of the federal poverty level Hours: Breakfast: Monday-Friday 9am-10:30am Lunch: Monday-Friday 1pm All other services: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 460-3822 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE DOUGLAS COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides health care, supported services, social and recreational programs, videos, articles, and brochures. 647 W Luellen Drive Suite 3 Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV and their families, friends, and loved ones Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 342-5088 162 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE JACKSON COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides health care, supported services, social and recreational programs, videos, articles, and brochures. 955 Town Center Drive Suite B Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV and their families, friends, and loved ones Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 342-5088 370 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE LANE COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides health care, supported services, social and recreational programs, videos, articles, and brochures. 1195 City View Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV and their families, friends, and loved ones Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ECUMENICAL MINISTRIES OF OREGON HIV SERVICES HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE DOUGLAS COUNTY HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE JACKSON COUNTY HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE LANE COUNTY
